title: caladenia ferruginea
intro: Caladenia ferruginea, also known as the Rusty Spider Orchid, is a species of orchid found in the southwestern region of Western Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. Caladenia ferruginea has been used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into a tea or salve, and it has also been used in folk medicine to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
